_comment: ISO 3166-1 country codes (alpha-2, alpha-3) and country names in multiple languages. Used to detect and redact country mentions in legal text. Names generated from Unicode CLDR via Intl.DisplayNames; aliases are curated for forms common in legal/business text (UK, USA, DRC, etc.).
